description.ko: FLORA-9은 유기적 생명체와 기계 지능의 궁극적인 융합을 나타내며, 수액 대신 데이터가 흐르고 빛으로 인코딩된 스트림을 통해 광합성이 이루어지는 식물 개체입니다.
description.en: FLORA-9 represents the ultimate convergence of organic life and machine intelligence, a botanical entity where sap is replaced by data and photosynthesis occurs through light-encoded streams.

prompt: A hyper-realistic digital nature scene featuring FLORA-9, a futuristic bioluminescent plant with translucent crystalline leaves showing glowing cyan fiber-optic veins and golden circuit patterns. The plant grows from a sleek metallic base amidst a swirling cloud of digital pollen and floating data pixels. Soft holographic UI elements hover in the background of a dark, high-tech laboratory. Cinematic lighting, macro photography, 8k resolution, ethereal aesthetic.
